title: Pennsic Planner
description: Browse the Pennsic 53 (2026) class schedule as a side-by-side day timetable, build a personal plan with time-conflict detection, import an updated CSV export, and export your plan to calendar (.ics).

dataSources.name: Pennsic 53 / 2026 class schedule
dataSources.description: Official Pennsic University class schedule for Pennsic 53 (2026), downloaded from thing.pennsicuniversity.org as a calendars CSV export on 2026-06-17 and normalized to the bundled record schema (1,836 sessions). The live schedule keeps changing; users refresh via the in-browser CSV import.
